# CANON REFERENCE: THE STILLWATER COVENANT

## CHARACTER FACTS

---

### PRIMARY CHARACTERS

#### MAREN COLE

**Identification**

- Full name: Maren Cole
- Covenant name (former): Vessel
- Former rank: Void Clerk
- Current occupation: Shop owner (Tide Quarter)
- Age: 51 years old

**Physical Description**

- Height: Five feet seven inches
- Build: Broad-shouldered
- Hair: Grey streaked with black (cut short for practical reasons—long hair can be grabbed)
- Eyes: River water color (not quite grey, not quite green)
- Face: Strong jaw, deep-set eyes, lines around mouth from holding words behind teeth
- Scar: White and precise, runs along left temple (never explains it)
- Voice: Lower than expected from her frame, smoker's rasp
- Movement: Economical, enters rooms near exits, positions with back to walls, sightlines to every entrance
- Hands: Never still—fidgeting, tapping, adjusting objects that don't need adjusting
- Dress: Earth tones, clothes that fit poorly on purpose, soft-soled shoes; cultivates forgettable appearance

**Personality Traits Affecting Plot**

- Hypervigilant (presents as ordinary caution)
- Affection expressed through competence, not words
- Chooses words carefully, delivers them flatly
- Short sentences, declarative statements
- Questions that are really confirmations
- Does not raise voice when angry—lowers it further
- Trails off when sentences would require articulating feeling
- Lets silence do work instead of speaking
- Speaks to herself more than she used to
- The fidgeting of someone who learned to keep hands ready

**Relationships**

- Daughter: Elara Cole (23 years old)
- Former colleagues: Wen Trellyn (Collection Quartile), Idris (former Void Clerk, runs tavern)
- Former superior: Dova Salter (The Arithmetician)

**Knowledge Boundaries**

| KNOWS | DOES NOT KNOW |
|-------|---------------|
| Covenant structure, safe houses, routes, dead drops, prices of silence | What "transferred" actually means regarding her parents |
| How to kill; methods, tools, timing | Full terms of Dova's deal with Elara |
| Dova Salter's handwriting on ledger entries | That Sera Colm is helping her |
| Which safe houses have new management and which honor old arrangements | Kellan's full plans against Dova |
| The Void Clerk Incident details (the killing itself) | Location of Mira Voss's founding ledger |
| Her parents' names (Ethan and Mira) | Elara's latent mercury-thread ability |
| The Arithmetician is dying (has known for some time) | What Lorn actually knows about the Void Clerk Incident |
| | Why Dova is so specifically interested in her retirement |
| | The Covenant has been observing Elara for years |

**Key Beliefs**

- Violence she committed has contaminated her irreversibly
- She can build a life clean enough to balance the ledger (the lie she believes)
- "There's no clean exit" (says this to herself so often it has worn smooth)
- "I know how this ends" (says when she absolutely does not know)
- Protection through silence is not a form of violence

---

#### DOVA SALTER

**Identification**

- Full name: Dova Salter
- Title: The Arithmetician
- Age: 73 years old
- Former occupation before Arithmetician: Debt collector

**Physical Description**

- Height: Five feet two to three inches
- Build: Thin, precise, composed of contained information
- Hair: White and thin, pinned back (someone else does it)
- Eyes: Grey like old paper (may have been brown once)
- Face: Deep wrinkles, thin lips always pressed together, does not smile
- Hands: Thickened at joints from decades working with mercury-thread, warmest part of her body
- Wears reading glasses pushed up on forehead like unexamined habit
- Dress: Layers of dark fabric, wool and silk, always warm because always cold
- The cold is not illness—it is age, the price of working with mercury-thread for 50 years

**Personality Traits Affecting Plot**

- Speaks in precise, measured sentences, semicolons audible in pauses
- Asks questions she already knows answers to, just to watch you lie
- Voice: Thin, papery, does not need to project
- Speaks softly; people lean in (intentional)
- Trails off at end of statements, waiting for you to demonstrate understanding
- Repeats names when considering them, tasting them
- Behind desks always, ledgers open in front of her
- Has not left her office in three years
- Maintains Quartiles through careful imbalance
- Makes sure they owe each other as much as they owe her
- Keeps all four Quartiles even the one she doesn't trust (balance requires opposition)

**Relationships**

- Assistant: Sera Colm (12 years)
- Maren Cole: Sees her as unfinished entry, did not retire her out of mercy but incompleteness
- Kellan Bray: Has known about his ambition for years, has been cultivating it
- Quarters: Three she trusts reasonably well, one she does not trust at all

**Knowledge Boundaries**

| KNOWS | DOES NOT KNOW |
|-------|---------------|
| Everything about Maren and Elara | Sera Colm is a rebel |
| The debt, its terms, its history | Full extent of Kellan's plans |
| Her own mortality (dying faster than anticipated) | What Lorn actually knows about the Void Clerk Incident |
| That Kellan is ambitious (cultivating this) | Whether the Covenant has a viable successor |
| That Maren killed someone who broke protocol 15 years ago | Whether her ledger will outlast her |
| The ledger of debts that were never settled | What the witness's evidence actually proves |

**Key Beliefs**

- Everything comes due (not threat, statement of fact)
- Without Covenant's structure, violence would be random and meaningless
- Randomness is worse than cruelty with purpose
- Brutality is necessary
- Believes the ledger balances (lie she believes)
- She is dying; mercury-thread has begun to reject her body

---

#### ELARA COLE

**Identification**

- Full name: Elara Cole
- Age: 23 years old
- Occupation: Works night shift at hospice
- Residence: Lives upstairs from her mother's shop

**Physical Description**

- Not detailed in source documents (secondary character)

**Personality Traits Affecting Plot**

- Has always known her mother is not what she claims
- Maintained careful unspoken agreement with Maren: Maren doesn't ask how much Elara suspects, Elara doesn't demand explanations
- Her talent: patients at hospice calm when she's near (latent mercury-thread ability)

**Knowledge Boundaries**

| KNOWS | DOES NOT KNOW |
|-------|---------------|
| Her mother is not ordinary | The full extent of what her mother did |
| Something is wrong when her mother goes to check on her at work | The Covenant's interest in her |
| | The latent ability she possesses |
| | What happened to her grandparents |

**Key Facts**

- The Covenant has been observing her for years
- She was almost recruited
- She showed signs Maren worked hard to ensure no one noticed
- The Covenant took her to make Maren return to service
- She is collateral and potential recruit

---

#### KELLAN BRAY

**Identification**

- Full name: Kellan Bray
- Title: Maintenance Quartile
- Age: Not specified (appears middle-aged)
- Role: Manages Covenant infrastructure, oversees witness management

**Physical Description**

- Not detailed in source documents

**Personality Traits Affecting Plot**

- Ambitious
- Calculating (watches Dova's hands, calculating)
- Knows Dova is fading
- Has lieutenants
- Plan: Extract information from Lorn, eliminate witness, present fait accompli to Arithmetician

**Knowledge Boundaries**

| KNOWS | DOES NOT KNOW |
|-------|---------------|
| Dova is dying | Sera is working against him |
| The witness holds destabilizing information | Full contents of what Lorn copied |
| Kellan and Dova are in conflict | |
| | |

---

#### LORN FEX

**Identification**

- Full name: Lorn Fex
- Former occupation: Covenant accountant
- Current status: Being held in Hollow, pending transfer

**Physical Description**

- Lives in modest apartment near Balance House
- Meticulous, careful, but not afraid
- Posture of a man who has accepted what is coming

**Personality Traits Affecting Plot**

- Found faith in Church of the Final Account
- Started believing the ledger should balance differently
- Copied files, hid evidence
- Knows about Maren's parents
- Knows about the Void Clerk Incident

**Knowledge Boundaries**

| KNOWS | DOES NOT KNOW |
|-------|---------------|
| Maren's parents were "transferred," not deceased | Whether Maren will kill him as ordered |
| What was written on the page regarding the transfer | Sera Colm is helping Maren |
| The ledgers don't lie but don't tell whole truth | Kellan's plan to extract his information |
| The Void Clerk Incident details | |

---

#### WEN TRELLYN

**Identification**

- Full name: Wen Trellyn
- Title: Collection Quartile
- Former relationship with Maren: Colleague

**Physical Description**

- Older than when Maren knew her
- Harder than before

**Personality Traits Affecting Plot**

- Still knows how to read a face
- Delivered news about the job, witness, deadline
- Knows Maren left the Covenant but still knows her

**Knowledge Boundaries**

| KNOWS | DOES NOT KNOW |
|-------|---------------|
| The job details, witness, deadline | |
| Elara has talent | |
| Covenant has been patient with observation | |
| Dova wants to close ledger before dying | |
| Seven days deadline | |
| The Arithmetician's deal has hidden conditions | |

---

#### SERA COLM

**Identification**

- Full name: Sera Colm
- Title: The Arithmetician's assistant
- Duration: 12 years
- Secret identity: Rebel, has her own ledger of names, debts, leverage

**Physical Description**

- Not detailed in source documents

**Personality Traits Affecting Plot**

- Has learned patterns, codes, names of the
